description: Trash Panda is a consumer mobile app and website for scanning grocery products and ingredient labels to identify additives, allergens, and cleaner alternatives. It also provides product and ingredient information plus subscription-based premium features.
summary: Trash Panda exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.trashpandaapp.com/v1/mcp` with SSE transport and no authentication; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `trashpandaapp.com`.
